content_of_post_to_answer: What should I do when everything seems to be falling apart?
answer: When everything feels like it is collapsing, the hardest part is often that we try to solve our entire life at once. A better question is: what is the one thing currently creating the most instability? Fixing that first can create enough space to see the rest clearly. I’ve explored this pattern of rebuilding after uncertainty in more detail on my profile, if you want to go deeper. A crisis rarely destroys everything at once; it usually reveals what was never stable to begin with.
